title: Replace furnace/HVAC air filter
description: Replace the air filter to maintain airflow and efficiency.

title: Annual furnace service/inspection
description: Have a technician service and inspect the furnace before heating season.

title: A/C / heat pump service
description: Annual service of A/C or heat pump before cooling season.

title: Chimney sweep / wood stove cleaning
description: Clean chimney and wood stove before heating season.

title: Inspect & clean fireplace
description: Inspect fireplace for damage and clean ash.

title: Refill / check propane or heating oil
description: Check fuel level before winter and schedule delivery if needed.

title: Pump septic tank
description: Have the septic tank pumped and inspected by a licensed professional.

title: Inspect septic system
description: Annual inspection of the entire septic system including drain field.

title: Test well water quality
description: Send water sample to lab for full mineral and bacteria panel.

title: Add salt to water softener
description: Check salt level and add as needed.

title: Replace whole-house water filter
description: Replace the whole-house sediment/carbon filter.

title: Test & exercise sump pump
description: Pour water in the sump pit to confirm the pump activates correctly.

title: Check well pressure tank
description: Check air pre-charge pressure in the pressure tank.

title: Engine Oil & Filter Change
description: Change engine oil and filter per manufacturer spec.

title: Tire Rotation
description: Rotate tires to even out wear across all four positions.

title: Seasonal tire swap (winter/summer)
description: Swap between winter and summer tires.

title: Brake Inspection
description: Inspect brake pads, rotors, and calipers for wear.

title: Tractor / mower service (oil, blades, belts)
description: Annual spring service: change oil, sharpen/replace blades, check belts.

title: Snowblower service & fuel stabilizer
description: Service engine, add fuel stabilizer if storing for season.

title: Generator test run & oil change
description: Run generator under load monthly. Change oil annually.

title: ATV / UTV service
description: Service per owner's manual: oil, filters, chain/belt, brakes.

title: Multi-Point Vehicle Inspection
description: Comprehensive inspection of all major vehicle systems at a shop.

title: Tire Pressure & Condition Check
description: Check and adjust tire pressure to spec; inspect tread and sidewalls.

title: Windshield Wiper Blade Replacement
description: Replace front and rear wiper blades.

title: Battery Inspection & Terminal Cleaning
description: Inspect battery health, check charge, and clean terminals.

title: Transmission Fluid Replacement
description: Drain and replace automatic or manual transmission fluid per spec.

title: Coolant Flush & Refill
description: Flush the cooling system and refill with fresh coolant.

title: Fuel System Inspection
description: Inspect fuel lines, injectors, and filter for leaks or deterioration.

title: Spark Plug Replacement
description: Replace spark plugs per manufacturer schedule for optimal ignition.

title: Drive Belt Inspection
description: Inspect serpentine and accessory drive belts for cracking or wear.

title: Engine Air Filter Inspection
description: Inspect and replace the engine air filter if dirty.

title: Cabin Air Filter Replacement
description: Replace cabin air filter to maintain interior air quality.

title: Brake Pad Replacement — Front
description: Replace front brake pads when worn past service limit.

title: Brake Pad Replacement — Rear
description: Replace rear brake pads when worn past service limit.

title: Brake Rotor Inspection and Replacement
description: Measure rotor thickness and replace if below minimum spec.

title: Brake Fluid Flush
description: Flush and replace brake fluid to prevent moisture contamination.

title: Shock Absorber and Strut Replacement
description: Replace worn shocks/struts to restore ride quality and handling.

title: CV Axle Boot Inspection
description: Inspect CV axle boots for cracks or grease leakage.

title: Tire Replacement
description: Replace all four tires when tread depth reaches 2/32".

title: Clean gutters & downspouts
description: Remove debris from gutters and flush downspouts.

title: Roof inspection
description: Inspect shingles, flashing, and ridge for damage or missing materials.

title: Inspect & seal deck / stain
description: Clean, inspect, and re-stain or seal the deck.

title: Seal driveway (asphalt)
description: Apply sealcoat to asphalt driveway.

title: Inspect foundation for cracks
description: Walk the perimeter and inspect foundation for new cracks or water infiltration.

title: Wash siding / inspect exterior
description: Power-wash siding and inspect for damage, rot, or pest entry points.

title: Inspect & repair caulking/weatherstripping
description: Inspect and replace door/window caulking and weatherstripping.

title: Trim trees / remove dead limbs
description: Inspect trees and remove dead or hazardous branches.

title: Clear brush / firebreak maintenance
description: Clear overgrown brush from around structures for fire safety.

title: Inspect & repair fencing
description: Walk fence lines and repair damaged or missing sections.

title: Clear culverts / ditches / drainage
description: Ensure culverts and ditches are clear for spring runoff.

title: Lawn care / aerate / reseed
description: Aerate and overseed lawn in fall for spring growth.

title: Flush water heater
description: Drain sediment from the bottom of the water heater tank.

title: Winterize outdoor hose bibs / shut-offs
description: Shut off and drain outdoor water lines before freezing.

title: Inspect washing machine hoses
description: Inspect rubber supply hoses for bulging or cracking. Replace every 5 years.

title: Test main water shut-off valve
description: Turn the main shut-off valve off and back on to prevent it from seizing.

title: Test smoke & CO detectors
description: Press test button on all smoke and CO detectors.

title: Replace detector batteries
description: Replace batteries in all smoke and CO detectors.

title: Test GFCI outlets
description: Press test and reset on all GFCI outlets to verify they trip correctly.

title: Inspect / service fire extinguishers
description: Check pressure gauge and have extinguishers professionally inspected.

title: Inspect electrical panel
description: Have an electrician inspect the panel for signs of overheating or corrosion.

title: Clean dryer vent / ductwork
description: Disconnect and clean the entire dryer vent run to prevent fire.

title: Clean refrigerator condenser coils
description: Vacuum coils at back or bottom of fridge to improve efficiency.

title: Clean dishwasher filter
description: Remove and rinse the dishwasher filter.

title: Clean range hood filter
description: Soak and scrub the range hood grease filter.

title: Descale / clean water heater & kettles
description: Descale kettle and flush lime from water heater anode rod.

title: Pest / rodent inspection & control
description: Inspect for entry points, traps, and pest evidence.

title: Fall winterization checklist
description: Complete fall prep: drain hoses, cover A/C, winterize irrigation, check weatherstripping.

title: Spring opening checklist
description: Spring startup: test irrigation, inspect exterior after winter, service equipment.

title: Check & restock emergency / storm kit
description: Verify supplies: water, food, batteries, first aid, flashlights, generator fuel.

title: Replace furnace humidifier pad
description: Swap the whole-house humidifier evaporator pad before heating season.

title: Clean bathroom & kitchen exhaust fans
description: Remove covers and vacuum dust from exhaust/vent fans to keep them moving air.

title: Professional duct cleaning
description: Have supply and return ductwork professionally cleaned to reduce dust and allergens.

title: Replace thermostat batteries
description: Replace batteries in the thermostat(s) to avoid a dead heating/cooling system.

title: Annual boiler service (hydronic/radiant)
description: Have a technician service the hot-water boiler and check pressure before heating season.

title: Bleed hot-water radiators
description: Bleed trapped air from radiators so they heat evenly.

title: Clean & reverse ceiling fans
description: Dust blades and switch fan direction for the season (down in summer, up in winter).

title: Clear debris around outdoor AC/heat-pump unit
description: Cut back plants and clear leaves/debris to keep at least 2 ft of airflow clearance.

title: Clean ductless mini-split filters & heads
description: Rinse the washable filters and wipe the indoor heads of each mini-split.

title: Replace HRV/ERV ventilator filter
description: Clean or replace the filters in the heat/energy recovery ventilator.

title: Replace HVAC UV lamp
description: Replace the UV air-purifier lamp in the air handler.

title: Replace UV water disinfection lamp
description: Replace the ultraviolet lamp on the well water disinfection system (lamp weakens after ~1 year even if still glowing).

title: Replace reverse-osmosis filters & sanitize
description: Change the RO pre/post filters and sanitize the system; replace the membrane every few years.

title: Shock-chlorinate the well
description: Disinfect the well and plumbing with chlorine to control bacteria.

title: Clean septic effluent filter
description: Pull and rinse the septic tank effluent filter to prevent backups.

title: Test sump pump backup battery
description: Verify the battery-backup sump pump activates and holds a charge.

title: Clean water softener resin bed
description: Run a resin cleaner through the softener to remove iron/scale buildup.

title: Replace sediment pre-filter cartridge
description: Swap the whole-house sediment pre-filter cartridge.

title: Service air compressor
description: Drain the tank of condensation, check oil, and inspect hoses/fittings.

title: Sharpen & oil garden/hand tools
description: Clean, sharpen, and oil shovels, pruners, and blades to prevent rust.

title: Service chainsaw
description: Sharpen chain, check bar oil, clean air filter, and inspect the chain brake.

title: Service pressure washer
description: Check pump oil, clean the inlet filter, and flush the system before storage.

title: Service string trimmer / leaf blower
description: Clean air filter, replace spark plug/line, and check for fuel-line cracks.

title: Add fuel stabilizer to stored small engines
description: Treat fuel and run engines briefly before long-term storage to prevent gummed carburetors.

title: Test & service standby generator
description: Run the whole-home standby generator under load, change oil/filters, and test the transfer switch.

title: Service hot tub / spa
description: Drain and refill, clean/replace the filter, and balance water chemistry.

title: Lubricate & safety-test garage door
description: Lubricate rollers, hinges, and springs; test the auto-reverse and photo-eye safety.

title: Repoint/repair masonry & mortar joints
description: Inspect brick/block/chimney mortar and repoint crumbling joints.

title: Inspect chimney cap, crown & flashing
description: Check the chimney cap, crown, and roof flashing for gaps or rust.

title: Clean skylights & inspect seals
description: Wash skylight glass and check the seals/flashing for leaks.

title: Wash exterior windows & screens
description: Clean exterior glass and rinse window screens.

title: Inspect soffit, fascia & roof vents
description: Check for rot, pest entry, and blocked soffit/ridge vents.

title: Pressure-wash walkways, patio & driveway
description: Remove algae, dirt, and stains from hard surfaces to prevent slips and wear.

title: Clean & inspect window wells
description: Clear debris from window wells and check covers and drainage.

title: Touch up exterior paint & trim
description: Scrape, prime, and touch up peeling paint on trim, doors, and siding.

title: Inspect exterior door thresholds & sweeps
description: Check and replace worn door sweeps and thresholds to seal out drafts and pests.

title: Inspect retaining walls & grading
description: Look for leaning walls and confirm ground slopes away from the foundation.

title: Winterize / blow out irrigation system
description: Drain and compressor-blow the sprinkler lines before the first hard freeze.

title: Spring irrigation start-up & head check
description: Recharge the irrigation system and inspect/adjust each sprinkler head.

title: Fertilize & treat lawn
description: Apply seasonal fertilizer/weed control per the lawn program.

title: Prune shrubs & refresh mulch
description: Prune shrubs/perennials and top up mulch in garden beds.

title: Clean, service & cover BBQ grill
description: Deep-clean grates and burners, check gas lines, and cover for storage.

title: Open pool for the season
description: Remove the cover, reconnect equipment, and balance water to open the pool.

title: Close & winterize pool
description: Lower water, blow out lines, add winter chemicals, and install the cover.

title: Re-sand paver joints & inspect patio
description: Sweep polymeric sand into paver joints and reset any heaved stones.

title: Inspect & clean landscape lighting
description: Clean fixtures, replace bulbs, and check low-voltage wiring/timers.

title: Replace water heater anode rod
description: Replace the sacrificial anode rod to extend tank life and prevent corrosion.

title: Descale / flush tankless water heater
description: Circulate descaler through the tankless unit to remove mineral scale.

title: Clean faucet aerators & showerheads
description: Soak and clear mineral buildup from aerators and showerheads to restore flow.

title: Test toilets for leaks & inspect flappers
description: Dye-test tanks for silent leaks and replace worn flappers/fill valves.

title: Inspect under-sink & supply lines
description: Check supply lines, shut-offs, and P-traps under sinks for leaks or corrosion.

title: Clean & deodorize drains
description: Flush and clean slow drains and traps to prevent clogs and odors.

title: Insulate exposed pipes for winter
description: Add foam insulation/heat tape to exposed pipes in unheated areas before freezing weather.

title: Test pressure-reducing valve (PRV)
description: Check incoming water pressure and adjust/replace the PRV if out of range.

title: Service & clean garbage disposal
description: Clean, deodorize, and check the disposal for leaks and dull blades.

title: Replace smoke & CO detectors (end of life)
description: Replace smoke and CO alarms that have reached their 7–10 year expiry.

title: Test whole-home surge protector
description: Check the surge protective device indicator and replace if it has tripped.

title: Test security system, alarms & cameras
description: Test alarm sensors, sirens, and camera feeds; replace any low sensor batteries.

title: Inspect & test EV charging station
description: Check the EVSE cable, connector, and mounting; confirm it charges and the GFCI works.

title: Test radon mitigation system
description: Confirm the radon fan/manometer is working and re-test indoor radon levels.

title: Inspect cords, plugs & power strips
description: Check for frayed cords, warm outlets, and overloaded power strips.

title: Exercise circuit breakers
description: Flip each breaker off/on once to keep the mechanisms free and reliable.

title: Clean & inspect solar panels
description: Rinse panels, check mounts/wiring, and verify inverter output vs. expected.

title: Replace UPS / backup battery
description: Replace aging batteries in the UPS or backup power supply.

title: Run washing machine cleaning cycle
description: Run a tub-clean cycle and wipe the door gasket to prevent mold and odors.

title: Replace refrigerator water & ice filter
description: Swap the fridge water/ice filter for clean-tasting water and good flow.

title: Clean oven / run self-clean
description: Clean the oven interior or run a self-clean cycle to remove baked-on residue.

title: Descale coffee maker / espresso machine
description: Run a descaling cycle to clear mineral buildup and keep water flowing.

title: Clean washer drain-pump filter
description: Clear the front-load washer drain filter of lint and debris.

title: Clean & sanitize ice maker
description: Run a cleaning cycle and sanitize the ice maker and bin.

title: Clean dehumidifier & check drain
description: Wash the filter and bucket and clear the condensate drain line.

title: Clean dishwasher spray arms & seals
description: Clear spray-arm jets and wipe the door seal so dishes get fully cleaned.

title: Termite / wood-destroying insect inspection
description: Have a professional inspect for termites, carpenter ants, and wood rot.

title: Perimeter pest treatment
description: Apply or schedule a perimeter barrier treatment for ants, spiders, and crawling insects.

title: Check for wasp/hornet nests
description: Inspect eaves, decks, and sheds for nests and remove them early.

title: Eliminate standing water (mosquitoes)
description: Empty or treat standing water in gutters, planters, and low spots.

title: Inspect crawlspace & vapor barrier
description: Check the crawlspace for moisture, pests, and torn vapor barrier.

title: Refresh rodent bait/traps
description: Check and re-bait rodent stations around the home and outbuildings.

title: Inspect attic for pests & moisture
description: Look for droppings, nests, leaks, and compressed/wet insulation in the attic.
